page_metadata.biotools__summary: Its main function takes as minimal input a list of ExpressionSet object, and searches all list pairs for duplicated samples. The search is based on the genomic data, phenotype/clinical data, and "smoking guns" - supposedly unique identifiers found in pData(eset).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Its main function takes as minimal input a list of ExpressionSet object, and searches all list pairs for duplicated samples. The search is based on the genomic data, phenotype/clinical data, and "smoking guns" - supposedly unique identifiers found in pData(eset).
